title: alchemilla glabra
intro: Alchemilla glabra, also known as the smooth lady's mantle, is a perennial herb native to Europe and parts of Asia, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves with five-parted leaflets. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alchemilla glabra include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Alchemilla glabra is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
